testCases.query: Generate a signup form component with email, password, and confirm password fields
expectedBehavior: Applies constraint-first prompt pattern with framework, tokens, a11y, and states specified
Includes design token injection block with semantic color and spacing tokens
Specifies accessibility requirements including aria-describedby for error messages
Runs generated output through 10-point review checklist before accepting

testCases.query: Convert this v0-generated card component to match our design system with CVA variants and proper TypeScript props
expectedBehavior: Applies 5-step refactoring process: extract tokens, apply CVA, add TypeScript, wire design system, verify theme
Replaces hardcoded hex and rgb color values with semantic design token classes
Converts conditional className strings to cva() variant definitions with defaultVariants
Adds explicit TypeScript props interface extending HTML element attributes and VariantProps

testCases.query: Write a Node.js script that reads a CSV file and outputs JSON to console
expectedBehavior: Does NOT activate ai-ui-generation skill because the task has no UI component generation
Does NOT apply prompt patterns or review checklist since no AI UI tool is involved
Handles as a standard backend scripting task without design token or component concerns

testCases.query: Generate a data table with sorting, filtering, pagination, bulk selection, and inline editing
expectedBehavior: Uses multi-pass iterative prompting: structure first, states second, advanced interactions third
Defines state transition map before writing prompts to ensure all states are covered
Separates sorting and filtering prompt from bulk selection and inline editing prompt
Reviews each pass output before proceeding to prevent error compounding across passes

testCases.query: I need to add a settings panel to my existing Next.js app, should I use v0 or Cursor?
expectedBehavior: Recommends Cursor for incremental changes within an existing codebase over v0
Explains that v0 generates from scratch without reading project context or existing tokens
Suggests hybrid workflow: v0 for initial visual exploration, then Cursor for integration
References the tool selection matrix matching task type to appropriate AI tool
